sglang.author: mss1213
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
BUG Description
When use wait_complete policy for HiCache prefetch and batch_get meet error, it will occur that the req in prefetch will not be scheduled because the operation will not be completed; This PR would change the operation complete condition, add one flag "failed" for the unexpected error

sglang.title: Add graph runner support with torch compile on CPU
sglang.author: CaoE
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Inspired by mingfeima#73. We add CPU graph runner with torch compile to reduce python overhead to speed up decoding on CPU.
Profiling with disabling torch compile:

Profiling with enabling torch compile:

From the profiling results above, we can see that torch compile can reduce python ov

sglang.title: move compile threads to an option to avoid OOM on low memory host
sglang.author: rainj-me
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When build on low memory host (e.g. <64GB) the default 32 threads nvcc compiler will directly lead to OOM. This 32 threads flag also lead to CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL_LEVEL not usable.
Modifications
Add SGL_KERNEL_COMPILE_THREADS flags to set the nvcc threads, combine with CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL

sglang.title: Add speculator attention backend switch
sglang.author: cicirori
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add --speculative-verify-backend parameter to control which backend (prefill or decode) is used for speculative decoding operations
Support both TARGET_VERIFY and DRAFT_EXTEND forward modes
Default to prefill backend for backward compatibility
Enable users to choose decode backend for potential perf

vllm.author: charlotte12l

Purpose
Similar to #21792, often for debugging purpose, we would need to get the full logprobs of prompt. This PR supports returning full prompt logprobs of vocab_size length, when SampleingParams.prompt_logprobs=-1 and ModelConfig.max_logprobs=-1
